CREATE PROCEDURE testproc(int, double) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE complexproc(int, string, date) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE bothargs(int, double) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE nestedproc(int, double) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
DROP PROCEDURE nestedproc(int, double) IF EXISTS;
CREATE PROCEDURE multiargproc(int, double, varchar) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
DROP PROCEDURE multiargproc(int, double, varchar) RESTRICT;
CREATE PROCEDURE removeme(int) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE emptyproc() AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE overload(int) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
CREATE PROCEDURE repeatedproc(int) AS 'BEGIN RETURN; END';
